meta.title: Compresso — Instant Image Optimization in the Browser
meta.description: Tiny, zero-dependency image optimizer. Compress, resize, and convert images on the client side — no server needed. Try it free.
meta.ogTitle: Compresso — Images optimized instantly, right in the browser
meta.ogDescription: ~3 KB library that compresses, resizes, and converts images before upload. Zero server load. Works everywhere.

hero.title: Stop fighting file uploads.
hero.subtitle: Compress, resize, and convert images instantly — right in the browser. No server needed.

playground.title: See It in Action
playground.subtitle: Upload an image or pick an example. Watch Compresso optimize it in real time.
playground.dropzone: Drop an image here or click to select
playground.dropzoneHint: Supports JPEG, PNG, WebP, AVIF — up to 50 MB

problem.title: The Problem We Solve
problem.subtitle: Every day, millions of people fail simple file uploads because systems push technical complexity onto users.
problem.stat1: of users abandon uploads due to file size errors
problem.stat3: common upload limit on government portals
problem.card1Text: "Your file is too large. Please upload an image under 2 MB in JPEG format." — Now what? How do I make it smaller? What's a JPEG? Why can't the system just handle my photo?
problem.card2Text: Systems externalize preprocessing tasks — format conversion, compression, resizing — onto users who lack the knowledge and tools to perform them. This creates cognitive distance: a gap between what the system requires and what the user understands.

features.title: Why Compresso
features.subtitle: Built for the systems that serve everyone.
features.tinyDesc: Smaller than most icons. Loads instantly on any connection.
features.zeroDepsDesc: Nothing to audit, nothing to break. Pure browser APIs.
features.clientSideDesc: No server processing. No API keys. No costs that scale with traffic.
features.universalDesc: Any framework. Any browser. Any device. Drop it in and it works.
features.qualityDesc: Smart quality tuning preserves visual fidelity while drastically cutting file size.
features.accessibleDesc: Designed for the users who need it most. Eliminates cognitive distance in file uploads.

code.title: Drop-in Integration
code.subtitle: Three lines of code. That's it.

impact.title: The Impact at Scale
impact.subtitle: Adjust the sliders to match your system. See exactly what changes.
impact.calcDisclaimer: Based on: 90.5% avg. JPEG compression, 500 Kbps upload, $0.085/GB bandwidth (AWS), $0.023/GB/mo storage (S3), $0.00015/img processing (Lambda), $12/ticket support. Actual results vary.

cta.title: Ready to eliminate upload failures?
cta.subtitle: Add Compresso to your project in under a minute.

footer.tagline: Made with care for the people who struggle with file uploads.

docs.title: Documentation
docs.installDesc: Install via npm, yarn, or pnpm:
docs.cdnDesc: Or use directly from a CDN:
docs.compressDesc: Compresses a single image. Accepts a File, Blob, or image URL string.
docs.compressMultipleDesc: Compresses an array of files sequentially.
docs.createCompressorDesc: Creates a reusable compressor instance with preset options:
docs.targetSizeDesc: Set maxSizeMB to ensure the output never exceeds a given file size. Compresso uses binary search to find the highest quality that fits:
docs.autoFormatDesc: When using format: 'auto', Compresso automatically detects the best format supported by the current browser.
docs.whyBrowserDesc: Client-side optimization means the server receives an already-optimized file. No server-side processing, no GPU instances, no image processing libraries to maintain. The heavier the traffic, the more you save — because each user's device does the work.

pwa.title: Install Compresso
pwa.description: Optimize images offline, right from your phone. No internet needed.
pwa.installed: Compresso installed! Find it on your home screen.
